sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94063" key="sidhrofuh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῐδηρο-φῠής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">φύω</etym>) <sense id="n94063.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of iron nature</tr_>, dub. l. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:106" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.106</biblScope></bibl>, where Bekker (after cod. A, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-φύσσα</foreign>) reads <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σιδηρόφῡσα</orth>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">forge-bellows.</tr_> </sense> </entryFree>
